title: NVR: Very High-Quality Company At A Cheap Price And Insiders Own 10%
text: NVR is a high-quality company with a unique business model. Its unique business model has allowed it to consistently earn high returns on capital, as well as consistently grow revenue, earnings, and free cash flow over the years.

title: NVR (NVR) Upgraded to Strong Buy: Here's What You Should Know

title: Lumber Price Crash Good for Homebuilding Stocks
text: Falling lumber prices are benefiting homebuilders and those with exposure to the very strong entry-level segment look particularly good.

title: 10 Most Expensive Stocks In 2022: Amazon Is Off The List
text: With Amazon.com, Inc's (NASDAQ: AMZN) 20:1 stock split in the rearview, the company no longer ranks as the fourth most-expensive stock in the world. Shares closed on Friday with a value of $2,447 — and the markets opened Monday with shares priced at a mere $122.

title: NVR (NVR) is a Top-Ranked Growth Stock: Should You Buy?
